headline: Assessing Starbucks (SBUX) Valuation As Turnaround Momentum And New Protein Offerings Draw Attention
summary: Starbucks (SBUX) is back in focus after affirming a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.62 per share and rolling out MUSH protein overnight oats across most stores, tying into growing consumer interest in higher protein options. See our latest analysis for Starbucks. The recent dividend affirmation and MUSH partnership come as Starbucks’ share price sits at US$97.80, with a 16.47% year to date share price return and a 22.93% total shareholder return over the past year, while longer term total...
